description:
​🩸 LIFESTEAL SMP: KILL OR BE KILLED 🩸
​Welcome to the most intense survival experience on LootexMC! In this realm, your life is literally on the line. Every fight matters, every heart counts. Will you become the strongest, or will you be eliminated?
​⚡ Epic Features:
​⚔️ Heart Steal Mechanic: Every time you kill a player, you steal 1 Heart from them permanently!
​💔 High Stakes: If you lose all your hearts, you will be ELIMINATED (Banned) from the realm!
​💎 Craftable Hearts: Use rare resources like Diamonds and Netherite to craft extra hearts and stay in the game.
​🛡️ Grief Protection: Claim your land and build your empire. Protect your loot from enemies!
​🏆 Killer Leaderboards: Show off your power! The players with the most hearts are displayed at Spawn for everyone to fear.
​🎁 Daily Rewards: Login every day to receive free kits, keys, and survival crates!
​🎮 How to Survive:
​Gear Up: Start by gathering basic resources and building a hidden base.
​Hunt: Find other players and engage in epic PvP battles to grow your health bar.
​Withdraw: You can withdraw your hearts into items to trade them or store them safely in a chest!
​Team Up: Create an alliance, but be careful... in Lifesteal, anyone can betray you for a heart!
​⚠️ WARNING: This realm is not for the weak. Only the smartest and strongest warriors will rule the leaderboard!
